mapper.insert:
insert into exam_assignment_answer (submission_id, question_id, student_answer, score, feedback, create_time) values
(#{item.submissionId}, #{item.questionId}, #{item.studentAnswer}, #{item.score}, #{item.feedback}, now())
mapper.select: select a.submission_id, a.question_id, a.student_answer, a.score, a.feedback, a.create_time, a.update_time, q.question_content, q.correct_answer, q.options, t.type_name, t.is_auto_graded, aq.points from exam_assignment_answer a inner join exam_question_bank q on a.question_id = q.question_id left join exam_question_type t on q.question_type_id = t.type_id left join exam_assignment_submission s on a.submission_id = s.submission_id left join exam_assignment_question aq on aq.assignment_id = s.assignment_id and aq.question_id = a.question_id where a.submission_id = #{submissionId} order by aq.question_order
